display_text: Spirit Breaker Aghanim's Scepter: Planar Pocket redirects all unit-targeted spells cast by enemy heroes towards Spirit Breaker. This is a powerful anti-targeted-spell mechanic, forcing enemies to choose between wasting their spells on Spirit Breaker or avoiding casting entirely, disrupting their ability to focus key targets.
search_text: Spirit Breaker Aghanim Scepter anti-targeted-spell redirect spell disruption role change

display_text: Spirit Breaker Aghanim's Shard: Increases Charge of Darkness bonus speed, turning Spirit Breaker into a faster and more efficient initiator. This upgrade enhances his ability to rapidly close gaps on enemies, making it harder for them to escape or prepare for his engagement.
search_text: Spirit Breaker Aghanim Shard faster initiation charge speed gap closer
